scripts.copy-to-desktop: rm -rf /mnt/c/Users/73523/Desktop/FreeRide && mkdir -p /mnt/c/Users/73523/Desktop/FreeRide && cp manifest.json /mnt/c/Users/73523/Desktop/FreeRide/ && cp -r dist /mnt/c/Users/73523/Desktop/FreeRide/ && echo 'Copied to Windows Desktop/FreeRide'
scripts.build:reload: npm run build && curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/reload
